title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 12 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 12 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 12 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 12/05/2022
May 12th, 2022 CFR Qingdao, USD/dry tonne DCE iron ore first up and then down, the main contract closed 796 final. the quotation in themorning was increased by 20 yuan/mt over yesterday. but as the disk continues to decline.
